$note: Crypto/auth-sensitive npm dependency manifest across all three npm workspaces (root/cli/extension). Reconciled by src/__tests__/checks/crypto-auth-deps-manifest.test.ts against (1) CODE imports derived via ts-morph AST over the crypto/auth roots, (2) each workspace package.json dependencies, (3) this manifest. A bump to any listed package should trigger deeper supply-chain review; a NEW crypto/auth import must be added here (or to excluded[]). Both this file and its enforcing test are CODEOWNERS-gated.

next-auth.reason: Core authentication framework (Auth.js v5): session strategy, OAuth/SAML/passkey/magic-link providers.

@auth/prisma-adapter.reason: Auth.js Prisma adapter backing the database session store.

@simplewebauthn/types.reason: WebAuthn type contracts used at the passkey verification boundary.

hash-wasm.reason: Argon2id password KDF (WASM) for vault wrapping-key derivation.

@prisma/adapter-pg.reason: Postgres driver adapter for the identity/session/token store.

pg.reason: Postgres driver underlying the identity/session/token store.

@prisma/client.reason: ORM for all identity/session/token tables (data-access boundary, not a crypto primitive).

nodemailer.reason: SMTP transport for the magic-link auth channel that carries the session-granting token.

resend.reason: Resend transport for the magic-link auth channel that carries the session-granting token.

otpauth.reason: TOTP (2FA shared-secret OTP) generation in the vault entry TOTP field.

otpauth@cli.reason: TOTP (2FA shared-secret OTP) generation in the CLI.

otpauth@extension.reason: TOTP (2FA shared-secret OTP) generation in the browser extension.

bcrypt-pbkdf.reason: OpenSSH-key KDF that decrypts encrypted SSH private keys in the CLI.

ioredis.reason: Session-cache transport, not a crypto/auth primitive.

@sentry/nextjs.reason: Error reporting, not a crypto/auth primitive.

bowser.reason: User-agent parsing for new-device detection, not a crypto/auth primitive.

zod.reason: Input validation, not a crypto/auth primitive.

uuid.reason: Deterministic UUIDv5 generation for SCIM Group IDs; an identifier utility, not a crypto/auth primitive.

@noble/hashes.reason: Test-only oracle (devDependency, *.test.ts) for crypto conformance vectors; not a runtime path.

@simplewebauthn/browser.reason: Production dep but not imported anywhere; the app uses the raw WebAuthn API instead (see webauthn-client.ts).

lucide-react.reason: Icon components (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive; imported in the shared component tree alongside the TOTP field.

next-intl.reason: i18n framework (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive; imported in the shared component tree.

react-markdown.reason: Markdown rendering (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive; imported in the shared component tree.

remark-gfm.reason: Markdown GFM plugin (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive; imported in the shared component tree.

@hookform/resolvers.reason: react-hook-form validation resolver (UI form glue), not a crypto/auth primitive.

@swc/helpers.reason: SWC runtime helpers (build output), not a crypto/auth primitive.

class-variance-authority.reason: Tailwind class variant helper (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive.

clsx.reason: className concatenation (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive.

dotenv.reason: Loads .env into process.env; not a crypto/auth primitive (no cryptographic secret handling).

file-type.reason: Magic-byte MIME detection for uploads; content-type sniffing, not a crypto/auth primitive.

jsqr.reason: QR image decoding (UI, e.g. TOTP setup scan); not a crypto/auth primitive — the OTP secret is handled by otpauth.

next.reason: Next.js framework, not a crypto/auth primitive.

next-themes.reason: Theme switching (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive.

pino.reason: Structured logging, not a crypto/auth primitive.

radix-ui.reason: Headless UI primitives, not a crypto/auth primitive.

react.reason: UI framework, not a crypto/auth primitive.

react-dom.reason: UI framework, not a crypto/auth primitive.

react-hook-form.reason: Form state (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive.

sonner.reason: Toast notifications (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive.

tailwind-merge.reason: Tailwind class merge helper (UI), not a crypto/auth primitive.

undici.reason: HTTP client for outbound webhook delivery; transport, not a crypto/auth primitive (webhook signing lives in app code).

chalk.reason: CLI terminal styling, not a crypto/auth primitive.

commander.reason: CLI argument parsing, not a crypto/auth primitive.

cli-table3.reason: CLI table rendering, not a crypto/auth primitive.

clipboardy.reason: Clipboard access, not a crypto/auth primitive.

inquirer.reason: CLI interactive prompts, not a crypto/auth primitive.

zod@cli.reason: Input validation, not a crypto/auth primitive.

tldts.reason: Public-suffix/domain parsing for autofill origin matching, not a crypto/auth primitive.

react@extension.reason: UI framework, not a crypto/auth primitive.

react-dom@extension.reason: UI framework, not a crypto/auth primitive.
